key_evidence: National Loss and Damage Policy launched (11 thematic areas, 85 directives, 11.7 billion Vatu 5-year implementation plan)
L&D Policy domestication translates international UNGA advocacy into binding domestic law — second INT-dim event after May 20 UNGA vote
Second UN climate resolution (Vanuatu lead co-sponsor) expected to go to vote end of May
ACT dimension uplift via specific 5-year implementation plan with budget appropriation
Cumulative INT-governance translation: UNGA leadership + domestic L&D Policy + second resolution pending = sustained INT/SYS pattern
